query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos WHERE estabelecimentoId IN (SELECT id FROM estabelecimentos WHERE nome NOT IN ('Maternidade Ela', 'Pronto Socorro Infantil'))) as arquivos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedimentos WHERE arquivoId IN (SELECT id FROM arquivos WHERE estabelecimentoId IN (SELECT id FROM estabelecimentos WHERE nome NOT IN ('Maternidade Ela', 'Pronto Socorro Infantil')))) as procedimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM permissoes_estabelecimento WHERE estabelecimentoId IN (SELECT id FROM estabelecimentos WHERE nome NOT IN ('Maternidade Ela', 'Pronto Socorro Infantil'))) as permissoes
